subcodes.first_line: In this day the Wronged One calleth from the prison-quarter unto the peoples of the world and summoneth them unto the Most Great Ocean [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز مظلوم از شطر سجن اهل عالم را ندا مینماید و ببحر اعظم دعوت میکند
subcodes.subjects: @principle of balance; moderation; equilibrium, @proclamation to the people of the world, @wisdom [hikmat], @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @the power of words; of speech
